subcategory : "Instances"

# ovh_cloud_instance_groups

Use this data source to list the instance groups (placement groups) of a public cloud project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_cloud_instance_groups" "groups" {
  service_name = <Public cloud project id>
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `service_name` (String) Service name / cloud project id

### Read-Only

- `instance_groups` (Attributes List) List of instance groups (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instance_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--instance_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instance_groups`

Read-Only:

- `checksum` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `current_state` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instance_groups--current_state))
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `policy` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `resource_status` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--instance_groups--current_state"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instance_groups.current_state`

Read-Only:

- `location` (Attributes) Observed location (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instance_groups--current_state--location))
- `members` (Attributes List) Instances currently belonging to the group (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instance_groups--current_state--members))
- `name` (String) Observed instance group name
- `policy` (String) Observed placement policy

<a id="nestedatt--instance_groups--current_state--location"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instance_groups.current_state.location`

Read-Only:

- `availability_zone` (String)
- `region` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--instance_groups--current_state--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instance_groups.current_state.members`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
